title: MENTORING IN ORGANIZATIONS
author: Abramova L.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Abstract   
  The article describes the characteristics of mentoring, tasks and steps of mentoring, importance of the mentor-mentee process. Mentoring steps are considered: establishing trusting relationships, clarification of objectives, interaction and training, closing of project.
